steps.verseArabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ ﴿٢﴾ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ ﴿٣﴾ مَالِكِ ___ الدِّينِ
steps.verseTranslation: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all worlds. The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Master of the ___ of Judgement.

steps.question: What do the ة ending and the root س-ل-م tell us about مُسْلِمَة?
choices: Feminine Ism meaning 'Muslim woman', from the root of peace/submission
Plural Ism meaning 'Muslim women', from the root of peace
Masculine Ism with an irregular root
steps.explanation: ة marks feminine gender; the root س-ل-م gives meaning (peace/submission); the مُفْعِل pattern indicates 'one who does the action'. Combining all three: 'a woman who submits'.

steps.question: What is the 3-letter root of رَسُول?

steps.verseArabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي أَسْرَىٰ بِعَبْدِهِ لَيْلًا مِّنَ الْمَسْجِدِ الْ___
steps.verseTranslation: Exalted is He who took His servant by night from Al-Masjid Al-___.

steps.question: What is the 3-letter root of مُؤْمِن?

steps.verseArabic: مُّحَمَّدٌ رَّسُولُ اللَّهِ ۚ وَالَّذِينَ مَعَهُ أَشِدَّاءُ عَلَى الْكُفَّارِ رُحَمَاءُ بَيْنَهُمْ
steps.verseTranslation: Muhammad is the ___ of Allah; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves.
